overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from an elevated transit view of a futuristic highway and neon-lit mega-structure at dusk, to a ground-level walk through a busy pedestrian plaza with reflective surfaces and dense crowds.

agents.ego_description: moving smoothly along an elevated transitway overlooking the multi-level highway and waterfront

entered.detail: curved multi-lane highway with vehicles moving below the camera position
massive tiered building with green neon structural lighting and red signage
elevated walkway along the water with distant city skyline visible
row of palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera glides smoothly along an elevated position overlooking a busy curved highway at dusk. A massive neon-lit building with green structural elements dominates the right side, while palm trees line the waterfront promenade to the left. Traffic flows continuously on the highway below, and the sky shows warm sunset colors transitioning to night.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with market vendors

events.description: hard cut from elevated highway view to ground-level plaza beneath building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded plaza with highly reflective flooring under a massive building overhang

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in futuristic clothing walking past the camera in various directions

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overhang with exposed industrial pipes and green neon lighting
wet-look reflective tile flooring mirroring the neon lights and pedestrians above
row of market stalls and food vendors under the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a ground-level pedestrian plaza beneath a massive industrial overhang. The plaza floor is highly reflective, showing mirror images of the neon lights and crowds. People in cyberpunk attire walk through the space in various directions, while vendor stalls line the background under the structure's green-lit framework.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sweeping aerial vista of a futuristic cityscape into the dense, reflective heart of a pedestrian plaza. It begins gliding along an elevated vantage point overlooking a curved highway at dusk, where a massive neon-lit building with green structural elements looms over a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. As the camera moves, the warm sunset colors of the sky deepen into night, and the perspective shifts downward from the flowing traffic toward the city floor. The scene then opens into a ground-level plaza beneath a massive industrial overhang, where the environment transforms into a crowded hub of people in cyberpunk attire. Finally, the view settles on the highly reflective plaza floor, which mirrors the vibrant neon lights and green-lit frameworks of the surrounding vendor stalls.
